option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
*.iml .gradle /local.properties /.idea/caches /.idea/libraries /.idea/modules.xml /.idea/workspace.xml /.idea/navEditor.xml /.idea/assetWizardSettings.xml .DS_Store /build /captures .externalNativeBuild .cxx local.properties
# Additional Android/Gradle ignores *.log *.jks *.keystore *.swp *.swo *~ ehthumbs.db Thumbs.db .vscode/ *.sublime-project *.sublime-workspace *.tmp *.temp proguard/ *.mapping app/build/generated/hilt/ *.class coverage/ *.exec test-results/ htmlcov/ node_modules/ google-services.json secrets.properties app/src/main/assets/mlkit_models/
